title: breonia citrifolia
intro: Breonia citrifolia, also known as the lemon breomia, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is native to Madagascar and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and treating respiratory issues. Breonia citrifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or extract, and is also used in some herbal remedies to promote digestion and alleviate stress.
